next_steps: Study the worked example: npm install && npx hyperframes preview (9:16, karaoke captions, cold-open hook)
Write the script — hook in frame one, 15-60s total, sound-off first (85% watch muted)
Voiceover: edit voiceover/segments.json, run the skill's scripts/tts.py — or drop your own vo.mp3 into voiceover/
Transcribe: npx hyperframes transcribe voiceover/vo.mp3 (word-level — the karaoke captions are built from this)
Rebuild captions: python3 voiceover/build_captions.py (regenerates the caption track from the transcript)
Edit compositions/seg1.html — keep captions in the safe band, content in the center 220-1500px zone, motion every 1.5-2.5s
QA: npx hyperframes lint && validate && inspect; extract frames — check captions inside safe zone
Render: npx hyperframes render -o out.mp4 --quality draft, then high
